name: Insect Prison: Remake
description:
Update2.0🔥

🪳You must fight or attempt to flee. Defeat does not mean death; it means capture. Losing a struggle results in being subjected to the insects reproductive instincts (breeding, parasitism, egg-laying). This is a hardcore survival RPG where your "health" is your stamina and mental resistance.🪳
creator: Metchisuki
